name: Document runAgent
instruction: Read packages/server/src/core/agent.ts and write a markdown documentation section for the runAgent function.

name: Document scaffold assertions
instruction: Read packages/server/src/core/scaffold.ts and document the evalAssertions function with a usage example.

name: Summarize shared types
instruction: Read packages/shared/src/index.ts and write a brief overview of the main data models (Harness, Task, TaskResult, RegulatorMemory).
